results.title: brk tech, A Berkshire Hathaway Group Company | DevCuration
highlights:
brk tech is a technology organization established within Berkshire Hathaway in 2026 to help Berkshire businesses adopt modern technology and artificial intelligence while preserving the conglomerate’s decentralized operating model. The San Francisco-based group focuses on AI adoption, cybersecurity, developer experience, enterprise platforms, and digital transformation initiatives across Berkshire Hathaway companies. Public materials list brk tech as a privately held organization with 11–50 employees.
...
Unlike a traditional software company, brk tech is not selling products into the open market. Its role is to help Berkshire subsidiaries accelerate technology adoption and operational modernization inside one of the world's largest business ecosystems. The timing matters because artificial intelligence is moving from experimentation to deployment, and large enterprises are facing the challenge of integrating new technologies into complex operating environments. brk tech appears designed to help bridge that gap.
...
Founded in 2026 and headquartered in San Francisco, brk tech describes itself as a technology organization built to help Berkshire businesses accelerate digital transformation through technology and artificial intelligence adoption. Many companies spend years trying to convince enterprises to modernize, but brk tech begins with access to a portfolio of established operating businesses already generating significant economic activity. The challenge is not customer acquisition. The challenge is execution.
...
Public job descriptions point to work involving Enterprise AI, cybersecurity, developer experience, omnichannel engagement, and enterprise platform modernization. These are not greenfield startups building from scratch. These are mature businesses operating in industries where reliability often matters more than novelty.
...
That is where many technology narratives collide with reality. Building a chatbot is easy. Modernizing systems across large operating businesses is hard. brk tech appears positioned at that intersection. Greg Abel, CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, has publicly emphasized the growing importance of technology and artificial intelligence across Berkshire businesses, providing important context for why organizations like brk tech are emerging now.
...
, and decision-making processes.
...
What is visible, however, is the type of talent brk tech is pursuing. Job postings indicate a focus on experienced operators who can work across product, engineering, business strategy, and program management. Public descriptions emphasize systems thinking, product discovery, stakeholder alignment, and the ability to translate ambiguity into execution.
...
Hiring is often a stronger signal than marketing. Companies tell stories. Hiring budgets reveal priorities. brk tech is actively recruiting senior product and engineering talent, including executive-level leadership roles with publicly listed compensation ranges reaching $300K–$400K.
...
That level of hiring suggests the organization is still building foundational capabilities. It also reflects a broader trend across Enterprise AI and digital transformation markets. As AI adoption moves from experimentation into implementation, demand is increasing for leaders who understand both technology and operations.
...
brk tech is a technology organization within Berkshire Hathaway focused on AI adoption, cybersecurity, enterprise platforms, and digital transformation initiatives across Berkshire businesses.
...
brk tech appears positioned to help Berkshire operating companies evaluate, implement, and scale technology and AI initiatives across multiple industries.
...
Yes. Public job postings show brk tech actively recruiting senior product and engineering talent, including executive-level leadership positions.

I lead Berkshire Hathaway Energy’s enterprise‑wide data, analytics, and AI transformation. I oversee the strategic vision and execution of initiatives that harness AI and machine learning to optimize performance, enhance customer experience, and accelerate digital transformation. Governance & Ethical AI: Establishing frameworks for responsible data use, transparency, and ethical AI deployment. Strategic Leadership: Guiding cross‑functional teams to deliver transformative outcomes through collaboration, innovation, and disciplined execution. results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques
...
machine learning, simulation, and mathematical
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and
...
to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
related field)
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.

# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Develop frameworks for evaluating and monitoring AI
...
, including reasoning
...
, consistency, performance, and fairness.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

results.title: Warren Buffett's $126B AI Investment Strategy — The AI Chronicle
highlights:
- 38.6% of Berkshire Hathaway's portfolio is parked in 3 key AI stocks.
- Apple leads the exposure through its integrated Apple Intelligence ecosystem.
- Amazon provides critical cloud infrastructure via AWS for AI training.
- Snowflake manages the 'fuel' of AI, which is high-quality corporate data.
- Buffett avoids Nvidia, favoring companies that apply AI to widen moats.
...
For decades, Warren Buffett, the legendary 'Oracle of Omaha,' was known for his aversion to technology stocks he couldn't fully wrap his head around. He preferred the safety of railroads, insurance companies, and consumer staples like Coca-Cola. However, the landscape of 2026 reveals a radical transformation within Berkshire Hathaway's portfolio. According to recent SEC filing analyses, 38.6% of the firm's $328 billion portfolio is now concentrated in just three stocks that sit at the very core of the Artificial Intelligence (AI) revolution.
...
Apple remains the undisputed crown jewel of Buffett’s holdings. Despite occasional share tranches being sold for tax optimization, Berkshire maintains a gargantuan position in the Cupertino tech giant. To Buffett, Apple isn't just a tech company; it's a consumer products powerhouse with an 'impenetrable economic moat.' By integrating Apple Intelligence into billions of devices, Apple has managed to bring generative AI directly to the average user without the need for complex cloud infrastructures.
...
Apple’s AI strategy focuses on privacy and on-device processing. This creates a new cycle of hardware upgrades, ensuring steady revenue for years to come. Berkshire is betting on the fact that AI will make the iPhone even more indispensable, increasing the 'switching cost' for consumers—a fundamental pillar of Buffett’s investment philosophy.
...
The second major force in the portfolio is Amazon. While Berkshire’s stake in Amazon is smaller compared to Apple, its importance is strategic. Through Amazon Web Services (AWS), the company controls the lion's share of global cloud infrastructure, which is essential for training and running Large Language Models (LLMs).
...
- AWS and AI Chips: Amazon is developing its own processors (Trainium and Inferentia), reducing its reliance on Nvidia.
- Logistics and AI: The use of AI in supply chain management allows Amazon to maintain profit margins that competitors simply cannot match.
- Advertising: Amazon's algorithmic models turn shopping data into a profit-generating machine through hyper-targeted ads.
...
Amazon is the
...
abler of the AI era.
...
The third stock completing this triad is Snowflake. This investment, which initially puzzled many analysts as it occurred during the IPO phase, is proving to be prophetic. Snowflake offers a cloud data platform that allows businesses to organize and analyze massive volumes of information. In the age of AI, data is the 'fuel.' Without clean, organized data, no AI model can function effectively.
...
Snowflake allows companies to train their own models on their own data securely, a service that is becoming increasingly critical as intellectual property concerns rise.
...
It is noteworthy that despite massive AI exposure, Berkshire does not own Nvidia shares. This highlights the difference between investing in 'infrastructure' versus investing in 'application.' Buffett prefers companies that use technology to enhance their existing market dominance, rather than companies that produce the hardware subject to intense demand cycles and competition. The 38.6% portfolio concentration is not a blind bet on tech, but a deliberate choice of companies that have the scale and data to dominate tomorrow's automated economy.
...
They are Apple, Amazon, and Snowflake, which form the core of Berkshire Hathaway's artificial intelligence exposure.
...
Through 'Apple Intelligence,' the company integrates AI into its operating system, making it essential for daily use and boosting hardware sales.

...
With the support and investment needed to explore new frontiers in generative AI, you'll be working alongside talented colleagues, innovating and leading projects that will transform how we manage risk and serve our customers.

Evaluation & Quality: Build robust evaluation frameworks to measure LLM efficacy, manage ground truth dataset quality, and guide the product development roadmap.
...
Architecture: Design scalable ML pipelines and RAG frameworks that integrate seamlessly with enterprise data structures.
...
5+ years of experience in a data science role, with a strong emphasis on NLP and ML, working in an agile production-oriented environment.

Proven Delivery: Experience successfully delivering multiple GenAI, analytical, or ML projects from conception through to production.
...

...
LLM Mastery: 5+ years of practical experience with open-source Large Language Models (Llama 3, Mixtral, etc.), including prompt engineering, inference optimization, and fine-tuning.
...

...
Education: Master's degree in data science, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.
...
Palantir Platform Experience: Hands-on experience or certification in the Palantir platform (Foundry/AIP).
...

...
# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
field. A Master's degree is strongly preferred and will be given special consideration.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
